section.div: A modern midnight VS Code theme featuring deep black backgrounds, soft white typography, cyan highlights, and golden accents based on Ayu Mirage theme.
An old portfolio site created by translating custom Figma prototypes into a functional multi-page site.
Atmos is a lightweight weather application built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript that integrates the Open-Meteo API for real-time atmospheric data.
